deleteClient.title: Delete client?
deleteClient.message: This will permanently delete the client and its contacts. This action cannot be undone.

deleteContact.title: Delete contact?
deleteContact.message: This will permanently delete the contact. This action cannot be undone.

clientsEmpty.title: No clients yet
clientsEmpty.subtitle: Clients you add will show up here.

contactsEmpty.title: No contacts yet
contactsEmpty.subtitle: Contacts you add for this client will show up here.
